data.title: 2025韩国教师节礼物
data.summary: [Teacher’s Day Special Coupon Notice] Sensei! Chiaki and Satsuki have prepared a gift full of gratit
data.body:
[Teacher’s Day Special Coupon Notice]

Sensei! 
Chiaki and Satsuki have prepared a gift full of gratitude in celebration of Teacher’s Day.
Thank you for your continued love and support for Blue Archive— and we look forward to all the guidance you’ll share with us in the days ahead!

#BlueArchive
![1.jfif](https://kivo.wiki/files/15949/B2tUAjhKeOHE7f0ZwucCe4JWOw5cYaTa.jpg)
